In this lesson, we're going to begin talking about the Six Figure Funnel Formula Lead Magnet Offer. Here's where we're going to begin to dive into the tactical elements and stages and steps of the Six Figure Funnel Formula. Specifically in this lesson, we're going to be talking about this step, the Lead Generation Page Process and Offer. What is a Six Figure Funnel Formula Lead Magnet Offer? It's an offer, as we talked about before, for a free piece of information. That free piece of information delivers value. It fulfills on the promise, which we're going to dive deeper into shortly, along with delivering your marketing and sales message. The free piece of information is built off of your Six Figure Funnel Formula Hook and Promise. Let me simplify this for you. The Lead Magnet Offer Page is the very first page in your funnel that a prospect comes to. You're going to learn how to do every step of this, so just hang tight. On the Six Figure Funnel Formula Lead Magnet Offer Page, you're going to state your hook and promise. What you can see is that is this page right over here. This is the page that you're going to use a specific type of Lead Magnet Offer Page, where you're going to convey your hook, your promise. Then what happens is on the very next page, you're going to deliver on what was promised here. You'll see exactly how this process works in just a second, and especially broken down in later lessons. For right now, I want you to understand that we generate a lead by getting somebody to raise their hand to learn more about your hook and promise. They enter their information. They click Submit, and you're going to learn how to do all this in just a bit. The next page that they come to actually delivers on that hook and promise and actually goes into what we call your customer captivation offer. Let me show you an example of how this would play out a little bit. Here is where you have your hook right over here, where it's free video, how to train any dog to sit in less than six minutes using this weird 12-word command. You already know that the promise is how to train any dog to sit in less than six minutes. The hook and also the unique mechanism is a weird 12-word command. In order to get access to this, somebody enters their email address, presses Submit on an opt-in form on a web form, and then they get brought to this page over here. You're going to learn how to do every step of this in later lessons, but now this free video delivers on this promise and this hook, and it includes something called your customer captivation offer. Very simple. In the rest of this module, we're going to break down the different elements that go into your lead magnet offer and your lead magnet offer page.
